title: Origins Multiplied
description: Origins Multiplied adds new features to the mod "Origins".
body:
This modpack is mostly used between friends.

# Welcome to Origins Multiplied.
This mod aims to provide a better experience when playing origins with friend. This includes performance benefits and many more origins to play as. This is a simple modpack not aimed at providing a custom server experience, it is more focused on a modern, no setup experience.

## Features

- Working minimap
- 40+ origins
- Waystones
- 50+ mods
- QOL Features like Dynamic FPS and BetterF3
